phrases.intent_en: Ask if the park is free to enter
phrases.cultural_note: The Plains of Abraham is a large urban park open to all. Only the museum inside charges admission.

responses.english: Yes, the park is free access.
responses.phonetic: wee luh PARK eh tahn ak-SEH LEE-bruh
responses.french: Oui, le parc est en accès libre.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Musée des Plaines d'Abraham is
phrases.text_local: Le musée des Plaines d'Abraham, c'est par là ?
phrases.pronunciation: luh moo-ZAY day PLEN dah-brah-AHIM say par LAH
phrases.cultural_note: The Musée du Parc des Champs-de-Bataille (Battlefields Park Museum) in the Martello towers tells the story of the battle with interactive exhibits.

responses.english: The museum is at the end of the park, that way.
responses.phonetic: luh moo-ZAY eh toh BOO doo PARK par LAH
responses.french: Le musée est au bout du parc, par là.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the park is free to enter
phrases.text_local: Le parc, c'est gratuit d'y accéder ?
phrases.pronunciation: luh PARK say gra-TWEE dee ak-say-DAY
phrases.cultural_note: The Plains of Abraham are a free public park year-round. The Museum and some activities have fees. In summer the park hosts major concerts.

responses.english: Yes, the park is free access.
responses.phonetic: wee luh PARK eh tahn ak-SEH LEE-bruh
responses.french: Oui, le parc est en accès libre.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about skiing or snowshoeing in winter
phrases.text_local: Est-ce qu'on peut faire du ski de fond ou de la raquette ici en hiver ?
phrases.pronunciation: ess-KON puh FAIR doo SKEE duh FON oo duh lah rah-KET ee-SEE ahn ee-VAIR
phrases.cultural_note: The Plains are transformed into a winter playground with cross-country skiing, snowshoeing, and ice skating on groomed trails.

responses.english: Yes, rentals are at the park chalet.
responses.phonetic: wee lah loh-kah-SYOHN eh toh shah-LAY doo PARK
responses.french: Oui, la location est au chalet du parc.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find the Martello towers
phrases.text_local: Les tours Martello, elles sont situées où exactement ?
phrases.pronunciation: lay TOOR mar-TEL-oh el son see-too-AY oo ex-ak-tuh-MAH
phrases.cultural_note: Four Martello towers were built in the early 1800s as British defensive structures. Two remain on the Plains and are open for tours in summer.

responses.english: Follow the trail to the south.
responses.phonetic: swee-VAY luh sahn-TYAY vair luh SOOD
responses.french: Suivez le sentier vers le sud.
